title: Enchanting Colors
description: Enchanted books are color-coded! Combined books will mix colors!
body:
# Enchanting Colors
**Color-coded enchanted books!**

See what enchants you have at a glance!

![colorful books! both cover and ribbon modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c103bda9e5f1252e45b20e18749526b00363162d.png)

## Features
- Books are colored based on what enchantments they contain!
- Either the ribbon or cover can be colored! (configurable)
- Books with all max-level enchants have a diamond seal! (configurable)
- Books with multiple enchantments have mixed colors & are larger! (configurable)
- Colors for all enchants, including modded ones, are configurable!

![mixing colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fefb1aa2483b0ed34c1ea8bc5580f62936991da.png)

## Details
- This mod is completely client-side!
- Book colors are cached, so there should be no performance hit!
- Textures & overlays can be customized with resource packs!
- The vanilla enchant glint on books is disabled by default for better visibility! (configurable)
- Color mixing currently just uses RGB. Fancier color spaces are being considered!
- !!!
